{{CargoRelic
|name=Cheat Code
|class_id=20374
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=Found on the [[Terminal]] after using Cheat Codes in [[Gene Simulation]] and reaching 700F
|description=On the memo is a string of programming code. It's most likely a backdoor left by the coder. Judging from its messy coding, the awful format, and the swearing in the annotations, the coder is probably undereducated and rude.
|fame=15
|art=17
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=29
|ss1=In Gene Sims, Snail HP +1000<br>In Gene Sims, Snail ATK +100<br>In Gene Sims, Snail DEF +100<br>In Gene Sims, Snail RUSH +100
|ss2=In Gene Sims, Snail HP +2000<br>In Gene Sims, Snail ATK +200<br>In Gene Sims, Snail DEF +200<br>In Gene Sims, Snail RUSH +200
|ss3=In Gene Sims, Snail HP +3000<br>In Gene Sims, Snail ATK +300<br>In Gene Sims, Snail DEF +300<br>In Gene Sims, Snail RUSH +300
|ss4=In Gene Sims, Snail HP +3000<br>In Gene Sims, Snail ATK +300<br>In Gene Sims, Snail DEF +300<br>In Gene Sims, Snail RUSH +300
|ss7=In Gene Sims, Snail HP +3000<br>In Gene Sims, Snail ATK +300<br>In Gene Sims, Snail DEF +300<br>In Gene Sims, Snail RUSH +300<br> (Awakened)
}}
